message:
fix(vdbe): migrate to SQLite record format encoding + pager test coverage

- Replace custom tagged record encoding (encode_mem_record/decode_mem_record)
  with proper SQLite record format (serialize_record/parse_record)
- Add pager test coverage for database header and page operations
- Sync beads state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
